texto: Oh ... why not?' he smiled. "This valley is a pleasant spot for meditation. I like New England... it is here that I have experienced some of my greatest successes - and several notable defeats. Defeat, you know, is not such a bad thing, if there's not too much of it... it makes for humility, and humility makes for caution, therefore for safety.' ("Trace")
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jerome Bixby: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “Oh ... why not?' he smiled. "This valley is a pleasant spot for meditation. I like New England...…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, caution, defeat pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de defeat e humility.

Defeat, you know, is not such a bad thing, if there's not too much of it... it makes for humility, and humility makes for caution, therefore for safety.' ("Trace")

texto: ..I was raised on the Torah, my wife on the Qu'Ran, my eldest son is an Atheist, my youngest is a scientologist, my daughter is studying Hinduism, I imagine there is room there for a holy war in my living room, but we practice live and let live.
explicacao: Citação de Jerome Bixby sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “..I was raised on the Torah, my wife on the Qu'Ran, my eldest son is an Atheist, my youngest is a…” articula vida, tolerance, reflexao em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como estudos e reflexao.

frase_original: ..I was raised on the Torah, my wife on the Qu'Ran, my eldest son is an Atheist, my youngest is a scientologist, my daughter is studying Hinduism, I imagine there is room there for a holy war in my living room, but we practice live and let live.
